violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the back two door. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2025

Cutting boards in the kitchen are scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of behind the induction burner have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
